productDisplayName: Nike Men Remix Crew Blue Tshirts
description: Composition Blue crew neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, fabric tape on inseam of the neckline, graphic print on the chest and nike swoosh on left sleeve Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean The nike JDI Remix Crew t-shirt gets an interesting twist in its tale with the twisted fonts of "Just Do It" on the chest. Get into the Nike spirit and exude a sense of style that will go down well with your peer group. Pair it with denims and boots for a sleek look.
